narration: Generate Parentheses builds the string one symbol at a time.
callout: The path must stay valid while it grows, not only at the end.

narration: We can always add an open parenthesis if we still have opens left to use.
decision: A close parenthesis is allowed only when there is an unmatched open one to close.

predictionPrompt.prompt: When is it safe to add a close parenthesis?

choices.label: Only when close is still less than open
choices.feedback: Correct. That means there is something available to close.

choices.label: Any time
choices.feedback: Not this one. Closing too early breaks the path.

narration: If a partial string is already broken, pruning stops that branch early.
callout: Early stopping saves work by avoiding impossible branches.
